title: Terms and Conditions | Vegan Tattoo Studios
description: The terms and conditions that govern your use of the Vegan Tattoo Studios website, directory listings, and editorial content.
content:
By accessing and using vegantattoostudios.com (the "Website"), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use the Website.

## Use of the Website

Vegan Tattoo Studios provides a free directory of vegan-friendly tattoo studios and artists, along with editorial articles about vegan tattooing. The Website is offered for general informational purposes only. You agree to use the Website lawfully and not to misuse, disrupt, or attempt to gain unauthorised access to any part of it.

## Directory Listings

Studio and artist listings are provided free of charge and are published in good faith based on information supplied to us or gathered from public sources. We do not own, operate, or endorse any listed studio or artist, and we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or current availability of any listing. If you are a studio or artist and would like your details added, updated, or removed, please [contact us](/contact-us/).

## No Medical or Professional Advice

Articles on tattoo aftercare, ink, fading, and related topics are for general information only and are not a substitute for professional medical advice. Always consult a qualified tattoo artist and, where appropriate, a medical professional before getting a tattoo or treating any skin reaction.

## Intellectual Property

Unless otherwise stated, the content, design, and branding on this Website are the property of Vegan Tattoo Studios. You may share links to our pages, but you may not reproduce substantial portions of our content without permission. Trademarks, studio names, and images belonging to third parties remain the property of their respective owners.

## Third-Party Links

The Website contains links to external websites operated by studios, artists, and other third parties. We are not responsible for the content, products, or practices of any third-party website, and following such links is at your own risk.

## Limitation of Liability

The Website is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Vegan Tattoo Studios disclaims all warranties and will not be liable for any loss or damage arising from your use of, or reliance on, the Website or any listing.

## Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms and Conditions from time to time. Any changes take effect as soon as they are published on this page, so please review it periodically.

## Contact

If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please [contact us](/contact-us/).
